feat: paleta teal, kanban fix, projetos, extrato e revisão completa

Correções críticas:
- lead-sheet: remove conflito controlled/uncontrolled no Input de responsável
  (causava crash no React ao clicar em lead no kanban)
- lead-sheet: separa useEffect do form reset e de leadProductIds
- project-sheet: company_id ?? '' → company_id ?? null (UUID inválido no Supabase)
- project-sheet: botão Criar desabilitado enquanto company não carrega
- leads/page: openEdit tipado como LeadWithRelations, fallback sem lead_products

Novas features:
- Paleta de cores teal Zeppelin em todo o app (sky- → teal-)
- Sidebar: esquema teal escuro (bg-teal-950)
- Extrato bancário: UI de conciliação (reconciled_entry_id)
- Lançamentos: dropdown de classificação inline
- Error boundary: app/(dashboard)/error.tsx

Remove report generator, LLM email drafting, and SQLite references.

ci(wave-5): consolidated CI pipeline with pytest, coverage, dependabot

- Add ci.yml: pytest + coverage gate, blocking ruff lint, secret scanning,
  governance checks, pip-audit — replaces standards-check.yml + governance-check.yml
- Add dependabot.yml: weekly auto-updates for pip + GitHub Actions
- Add coverage config to pyproject.toml (source, omit, report)
- Pin all GitHub Actions to commit SHAs (supply chain hardening)
- Expand secret scan patterns: OpenAI project keys, Gemini/Google API keys
- Add push trigger on main for defence-in-depth
- Fix 16 ruff violations (14 auto-fix + 2 manual E741)
- Delete standards-check.yml + governance-check.yml (consolidated into ci.yml)

Fix DualSide DTE: count SPX expirations instead of calendar days

Fetch one wide chain (3-10 DTE window), extract all available SPX
expirations sorted by date, pick 1st as 5DTE and 2nd as 6DTE.
This ensures the two sides always land on different expiration dates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Cache Union.fit lookup tables for daily pipeline use

Daily exports have empty pass_types.csv and revenue_categories.csv
(header-only), but the pipeline needs them to resolve revenue categories.
Added pass_type_lookups and revenue_category_lookups DB tables (migration
013) that cache from full exports and serve as fallback for daily runs.

- New lookup-store.ts: save/load functions for both lookup tables
- zip-download-pipeline.ts: auto-cache on full export, load from DB on empty
- zip-schemas.ts: added feesOutside/passCategoryName to RawPassType
- scripts/seed-lookup-cache.ts: one-time seeder from full export
- Seeded 1,424 pass types + 65 revenue categories to prod DB

commit.message:
feat(dev): add dev-grow-specialist skill (#228)

* feat(dev): add dev-grow-specialist skill

Evolve ecosystem building specialists from friction observations
to autonomous subagents. Completes the grow-specialist family:

- notes-grow-specialist (PKM friction → subagents)
- bot-grow-specialist (lead bot friction → subagents)
- design-grow-specialist (design friction → subagents)
- dev-grow-specialist (building friction → subagents)

Friction types: scaffolding, review, testing, maintenance, workflow, tooling

Distinction from syner-grow-orchestration:
- orchestration: routing/delegation → principles in syner-boundaries
- dev-grow: building/maintaining → specialists in apps/dev/agents/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Point TTS client to Netlify function (absolute URL)

Cloudflare Workers IPs are blocked by Microsoft Edge TTS servers.
Site stays on Cloudflare Pages; TTS function remains on Netlify where
it works reliably via node-edge-tts npm package.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: pass Supabase URLs directly to Late instead of re-uploading

Late accepts publicly accessible HTTPS URLs in mediaItems, so we
no longer need to download images from Supabase and re-upload via
presigned URLs. This reduces the publish call from N+2 API calls
to a single POST /v1/posts, avoiding Vercel function timeouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: support GitHub Enterprise URLs in parseOwnerRepo

Remove hardcoded github.com hostname check so GHE URLs (both HTTPS and
SSH) are accepted. Add hostname field to the return type for consumers
that need to construct API base URLs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: read LLM_PROVIDER at runtime instead of module load

The env var was being cached at module import time, before Railway
had set it. Now reads from os.environ at function call time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: do not read stdin in SessionStart hook

Superpowers session-start script never reads stdin. If Claude Code
opens a pipe but never writes/closes it, cat blocks forever causing
timeout. Use printf for output, skip stdin entirely.

commit.message:
Implement Repair-Time Knowledge Retrieval system

Add intelligent error recovery by retrieving knowledge from:
- Error memory (past similar errors + how fixed)
- Tutorial memory (best practices + safety checks)

Core components:
- ErrorClassification enum (8 error types with pattern matching)
- ErrorRepairStrategy: past fixes with success rates
- TutorialRepairHint: tutorial-based repair suggestions
- RepairKnowledge: aggregated repair knowledge
- ErrorRepairRetriever: retrieves from error + tutorial memory
- RepairActionGenerator: LLM-based repair action generation
- ErrorRecoveryManager: state machine for error handling flow
- compute_adaptive_backoff: confidence-based retry timing
- RepairMetrics: effectiveness tracking

32 tests covering all core functionality.

and the fields weren't ready when fill() was called.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: close contradicted positions immediately before placing new orders

CONTRADICT auto-close was coupled to the new order's fill event, causing
two distinct failure modes: (1) IB quantity aggregation race condition when
multiple theses share strikes, and (2) orphaned positions when the trigger
order times out. This moves CONTRADICT handling to execute before order
placement using a durable pending_close flag in TMS.

- Add TMS mark_pending_close/clear_pending_close/get_pending_close_theses
- Mark contradicted theses in generate_and_queue_orders via TMS flag
- Close pending_close theses in place_queued_orders before order loop
- Add _close_contradicted_thesis with thesis-specific qty capping
- Add position audit safety net for failed close retry
- Neuter fill handler deferred invalidation to warning-only
- Remove _processed_supersedes module-level state (now dead code)

Globe particle overhaul, SwipeCTA component, and CTA unification

- Convert globe land masses from solid shader mesh to uniform grid particles
  (0.3° spacing, ~300k points, no jitter) with latitude-based color gradient
- Reduce ocean particle density and tighten edge falloff for crisper dots
- Change arc and marker colors from cyan to brand orange→red gradient
- Add reusable SwipeCTA component with left-to-right swipe hover effect
  that exits to the right on mouse leave, with reduced motion fallback
- Unify CTA buttons across homepage, case study, and navigation header
- Restyle homepage "See the work" to match case study secondary button

Resolves DEF-115, DEF-118, DEF-120

commit.message:
Fix Edge TTS 403: add Sec-MS-GEC anti-abuse headers

Microsoft added Sec-MS-GEC (SHA-256 of 5-minute-rounded Windows file time)
and Sec-MS-GEC-Version headers as required authentication in 2024.
Without these the server returns 403 Forbidden.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(screenshot): use mpv IPC socket instead of framebuffer capture

DRM mode on Pi 4 with vc4-kms-v3d has no framebuffer (fb0),
so fbgrab/ffmpeg capture always fails. Switch to mpv IPC socket
(--input-ipc-server) which works in both DRM and X11 modes.

- Add --input-ipc-server=/tmp/mpv-socket to mpv args
- Screenshot via socat → mpv socket (screenshot-to-file command)
- Fallback to Xorg import for hybrid mode
- Add socat to install.sh deps, remove unused fbgrab

commit.message:
docs(ops): update Task 9 to use backend→database blocking scenario

The original Task 9 blocked frontend→backend, but the frontend is a
static Next.js app with no server-side calls to the backend. Changed
to block backend→database (port 5432), which is the most active
inter-pod flow and causes visible pod restarts in Grafana.
